title: Sequential state transitions with stacked nodes attempt to show an ordered, governed set of steps. The design explores visual hierarchy between predecessor, current, and blocked states but reads as a generic workflow sketch rather than an emblem of structural certainty.
conceptualBridge: The stacked nodes mean ordered state change, but the result reads as a generic process diagram instead of a durable product mark.
decision: Useful baseline reference but not yet a viable brand direction, kept visible for comparison and possible revisit.
